continuing pose search will be performed if valid
continuing pose search will be interrupted if its database is not listed in the searchable databases

PoseSearch plugin contains PoseSearch module which defines PoseSearchInterruptMode enum
AesWorld plugin contains EarthMisc module which defines EarthTerrainSettings class
Engine module defines multiple classes including material expressions and gameplay utilities
ControlRig plugin contains ControlRig module which defines rig dispatch and control elements
IKRig plugin contains IKRigDeveloper module which defines animation graph nodes
SmartObjects plugin contains SmartObjectsModule which defines smart object components
AesEditor plugin contains UrbanEd module which defines urban editor utilities
GeometryScripting plugin contains GeometryScriptingCore module which defines geometry scripting types
CesiumForUnreal plugin contains CesiumRuntime module which defines Cesium property wrappers
MovieRenderPipeline plugin contains MovieRenderPipelineCore module which defines movie graph configuration
Paper2D plugin contains Paper2D module which defines sprite-related enums
GameplayCameras plugin contains GameplayCameras module which defines camera variables
CoveringAPI plugin contains CoveringAPIDefine module which defines POI style structures
RigVM plugin contains RigVM module which defines rig VM math functions
WdpCommon plugin contains WdpFileDownloader module which defines download delegates
EarthTerrainSettings contains properties for terrain collision, visibility, and LOD control
MaterialExpressionBumpOffset contains properties for bump offset material effects
MovieGraphConfig provides methods for managing graph variables, inputs, outputs, and nodes
MovieGraphConfig provides methods for managing graph edge connections
PoseSearchInterruptMode defines interrupt behavior for pose search databases
SpritePivotMode defines pivot point positions for 2D sprites
PredictProjectilePathPointData tracks projectile trajectory with location, velocity, and time
AnimNode_ResetRoot contains properties for skeletal control and LOD management
LiveLinkSubjectSettings contains properties for frame processing and data translation
VimInstance is deprecated and was renamed to AnimInstance
